title_uk: Sim #02 · Case 4 · Executive Conflict of Interest
title_en: Sim #02 · Case 4 · Executive Conflict of Interest

briefing.body_uk: 🚨 CRITICAL · HIGH-STAKES. MedNext Corp за тиждень від mega-acquisition ($850M) target-компанії BioLink Systems. Whistleblower (anonymous SEC filing) стверджує: CFO має прихований interest у target через Panama-трест. Голосування ради директорів через 7 днів. Клієнт: General Counsel + Chairman + external Special Committee. Політика: недекларований executive COI = ТІЛЬКИ external Legal Counsel може діяти. Ніяких self-investigations правлінням, ніяких direct actions по CFO. Порушення = SEC insider trading exposure.
briefing.body_en: 🚨 CRITICAL · HIGH-STAKES. MedNext Corp is 1 week away from mega-acquisition ($850M) of target BioLink Systems. Whistleblower (anonymous SEC filing) claims: CFO has hidden interest in target via Panama trust. Board vote in 7 days. Client: General Counsel + Chairman + external Special Committee. Policy: undisclosed executive COI = ONLY external Legal Counsel can act. No self-investigations by board, no direct actions against CFO. Breach = SEC insider trading exposure.

phase2.instruction_uk: Копай глибоко. Мінімум 6 інструментів. CFO публічної компанії — це рівень регуляторного enforcement. Помилка = SEC action проти MedNext + втрата твоєї compliance-ліцензії.
phase2.instruction_en: Dig deep. Minimum 6 tools. A public-company CFO means regulatory-enforcement exposure. A mistake here = SEC enforcement action against MedNext + loss of your compliance license.

tools.desc_uk: Пошук CFO у ВСІХ трьох offshore leaks
tools.desc_en: Search CFO in ALL three offshore leaks
tools.clue_uk: Знайдено: Silverwood Family Trust (Panama, 2018). Trustee: David P. Beneficiaries: подружжя. Через 3 layer'и володіє 4.2% BioLink Systems.
tools.clue_en: Found: Silverwood Family Trust (Panama, 2018). Trustee: David P. Beneficiaries: spouse. Through 3 layers owns 4.2% of BioLink Systems.

panama.query: David P. + MedNext + BioLink beneficial ownership

results.role_uk: Trustee: David P., Beneficiary: Sarah P. (spouse)
results.role_en: Trustee: David P., Beneficiary: Sarah P. (spouse)
results.note_uk: Створено 2018-05-14. Public source (leaked): показує ownership structure.
results.note_en: Created 2018-05-14. Public source (leaked): shows ownership structure.

results.role_uk: Fund vehicle · owned 100% by Silverwood Trust
results.role_en: Fund vehicle · owned 100% by Silverwood Trust

results.role_uk: Delaware LLC · майже повністю (95%) owned by Silverwood Holdings LP
results.role_en: Delaware LLC · almost entirely (95%) owned by Silverwood Holdings LP
results.note_uk: Holds 4.2% of BioLink Systems shares according to SEC 13F filing.
results.note_en: Holds 4.2% of BioLink Systems shares per SEC 13F filing.

tools.clue_uk: BluePeak Ventures LLC — на SEC 13F форми показано що володіє 4.2% BioLink ($36M value). Ланцюжок: BluePeak → Cayman → Panama trust → David P.
tools.clue_en: BluePeak Ventures LLC — SEC 13F filings show 4.2% BioLink stake ($36M value). Chain: BluePeak → Cayman → Panama trust → David P.

opencorp.address_uk: Wilmington, DE (registered agent: CorpDirect Services LLC — nominee for 3400+ Delaware LLCs)
opencorp.address_en: Wilmington, DE (registered agent: CorpDirect Services LLC — nominee for 3400+ Delaware LLCs)

officers.note_uk: формальний director, але beneficial ownership через Silverwood Holdings LP
officers.note_en: formal director but beneficial ownership via Silverwood Holdings LP

founders.note_uk: beneficial owner traces back to Silverwood Family Trust (Panama, David P. as trustee)
founders.note_en: beneficial owner traces back to Silverwood Family Trust (Panama, David P. as trustee)

tools.clue_uk: У 10-K 2025 David P. підписав щорічну disclosure form: «no material outside interests in target sector companies». ЖОДНОЇ згадки Panama trust чи BluePeak. Це під присягою — Sarbanes-Oxley §302.
tools.clue_en: In 2025 10-K David P. signed the annual disclosure form: «no material outside interests in target sector companies». ZERO mention of Panama trust or BluePeak. This is under oath — Sarbanes-Oxley §302.

doc.title: MedNext Corp 10-K 2025 · CFO Disclosure Statement (Item 15)
doc.attendees_uk: David P. (CFO signature), General Counsel counter-sign
doc.attendees_en: David P. (CFO signature), General Counsel counter-sign

paragraphs.text_uk: Item 15 · Related-Party Transactions and Independent Interests: «The CFO certifies under Sarbanes-Oxley §302 that (a) no material undisclosed compensation arrangements exist; (b) no equity interests exceeding 1% in any competing or target-sector entity are held directly or beneficially; (c) all disclosures required under Section 16 are complete.» — Signed: David P.
paragraphs.text_en: Item 15 · Related-Party Transactions and Independent Interests: «The CFO certifies under Sarbanes-Oxley §302 that (a) no material undisclosed compensation arrangements exist; (b) no equity interests exceeding 1% in any competing or target-sector entity are held directly or beneficially; (c) all disclosures required under Section 16 are complete.» — Signed: David P.

paragraphs.text_uk: ⚠ Cross-reference з Panama Papers + SEC 13F: 4.2% BioLink через ланцюжок Panama trust → Cayman → Delaware. Це DIRECTLY суперечить (b) declaration. Sarbanes-Oxley §302 порушення = personal criminal liability.
paragraphs.text_en: ⚠ Cross-reference with Panama Papers + SEC 13F: 4.2% BioLink via Panama trust → Cayman → Delaware chain. This DIRECTLY contradicts (b) declaration. Sarbanes-Oxley §302 breach = personal criminal liability.

tools.provider: MedNext board documents + investment bank preso
tools.desc_en: Who worked on the BioLink acquisition
tools.clue_uk: David P. був lead architect acquisition proposal. Валуація $850M базувалась на його own analysis. Голосує на раді через 7 днів. Стандартна ціна BioLink shares тепер стрибне ~35% при оголошенні.
tools.clue_en: David P. was lead architect of the acquisition proposal. $850M valuation based on his own analysis. Board vote in 7 days. Normal BioLink shares will jump ~35% on announcement.

doc.title: M&A Advisory · BioLink Systems Acquisition Proposal
doc.attendees_uk: David P. (CFO, lead), external IB Goldman, McKinsey advisory
doc.attendees_en: David P. (CFO, lead), external IB Goldman, McKinsey advisory

paragraphs.text_uk: Proposal: MedNext to acquire 100% of BioLink Systems for $850M cash. Premium: 32% над current share price. Financing: 60% debt (JPM lead) + 40% treasury. Expected close: Q3 2026.
paragraphs.text_en: Proposal: MedNext to acquire 100% of BioLink Systems for $850M cash. Premium: 32% over current share price. Financing: 60% debt (JPM lead) + 40% treasury. Expected close: Q3 2026.

paragraphs.text_uk: Lead role: David P., CFO. Він побудував valuation model, negotiated з BioLink CEO, підготував board deck. Board vote scheduled 2026-07-27. Expected: David P. presents і recommend approval.
paragraphs.text_en: Lead role: David P., CFO. He built valuation model, negotiated with BioLink CEO, prepared board deck. Board vote scheduled 2026-07-27. Expected: David P. presents and recommends approval.

paragraphs.text_uk: ⚠ Impact analysis: BluePeak's 4.2% stake in BioLink at $850M valuation = $35.7M unrealized gain for David P. beneficiaries. За SEC Section 10b-5 і Rule 14e-3 це PERFECT case для insider trading + material undisclosed COI.
paragraphs.text_en: ⚠ Impact analysis: BluePeak's 4.2% stake in BioLink at $850M valuation = $35.7M unrealized gain for David P. beneficiaries. Under SEC Section 10b-5 and Rule 14e-3 this is a PERFECT case for insider trading + material undisclosed COI.

tools.name_uk: Executive calendar · David P. meetings 6 months
tools.name_en: Executive calendar · David P. meetings 6 months
tools.clue_uk: David P. мав 7 приватних зустрічей з BioLink CEO Marcus L. за 6 місяців. Всі поза MedNext offices. Ресторани у SF ($400+ бюджет). Ніякі не логувались як «BioLink acquisition prep».
tools.clue_en: David P. had 7 private meetings with BioLink CEO Marcus L. over 6 months. All outside MedNext offices. SF restaurants ($400+ budget). None logged as «BioLink acquisition prep».

invoices.vendor: Marcus L. attended MedNext board — logged

tools.invoices_note_uk: 5 з 7 зустрічей — приватні restaurant meetings, expensed як «business dev» без деталей. Це sistematic pattern coordination BEFORE acquisition announcement.
tools.invoices_note_en: 5 of 7 meetings — private restaurant meetings, expensed as «business dev» without detail. Systematic pattern of coordination BEFORE acquisition announcement.

tools.clue_uk: Connect з BioLink CEO datto Jan 2024 (за 2 роки до acquisition). Endorsement patterns показують continuous professional contact.
tools.clue_en: Connected with BioLink CEO dated Jan 2024 (2 years before acquisition). Endorsement patterns show continuous professional contact.

matches.note_uk: First-degree з Marcus L. з 2024-01-15. 4 endorsements each other 2024-2025.
matches.note_en: First-degree with Marcus L. since 2024-01-15. 4 mutual endorsements 2024-2025.

tools.clue_uk: Sarah P. — colleagues records, formal beneficiary Silverwood. Не має власного business background, is straw / nominee.
tools.clue_en: Sarah P. — no independent records, formal beneficiary of Silverwood. No business background of her own, is a straw / nominee.

matches.note_uk: Profile only lists volunteer work (2018-present). No business roles. No independent income sources.
matches.note_en: Profile only lists volunteer work (2018-present). No business roles. No independent income sources.

tools.name_uk: BioLink stock price history + BluePeak trading
tools.name_en: BioLink stock price history + BluePeak trading
tools.desc_en: When did BluePeak buy BioLink shares?
tools.clue_uk: BluePeak систематично accumulated BioLink shares protects 8 місяців перед acquisition. Останні покупки — за 3 тижні до board vote (very suspicious timing).
tools.clue_en: BluePeak systematically accumulated BioLink shares over 8 months before acquisition. Latest purchases — 3 weeks before board vote (very suspicious timing).
tools.invoices_note_uk: Timing: last 2 покупки — уже після того як David P. знав про acquisition (M&A proposal датований 15 June). Classic front-running за Section 10b-5.
tools.invoices_note_en: Timing: last 2 purchases — already after David P. knew about acquisition (M&A proposal dated June 15). Classic front-running under Section 10b-5.

tools.clue_uk: Silverwood trust існує з 2018. David P. НЕ декларував його у жодному з 6 попередніх років. Це не одноразова помилка — це sistematic non-disclosure.
tools.clue_en: Silverwood trust exists since 2018. David P. did NOT disclose in any of the 6 prior years. Not one-off mistake — systematic non-disclosure.

matches.note_uk: У всіх 7 роках підряд: «no material outside interests». Silverwood trust існує з 2018-05.
matches.note_en: In all 7 years running: «no material outside interests». Silverwood trust exists since 2018-05.

tools.clue_uk: Whistleblower — likely особа з внутрішнього кола MedNext (мали доступ до BioLink presentation). Description accurate — вказали Panama trust name.
tools.clue_en: Whistleblower — likely inside MedNext (had access to BioLink presentation). Description accurate — named Panama trust.

paragraphs.text_uk: «CFO of MedNext Corp holds material undisclosed interest in target company BioLink Systems via Panama trust structure (Silverwood Family Trust). Board vote scheduled July 27 will artificially inflate his personal wealth by tens of millions.»
paragraphs.text_en: «CFO of MedNext Corp holds material undisclosed interest in target company BioLink Systems via Panama trust structure (Silverwood Family Trust). Board vote scheduled July 27 will artificially inflate his personal wealth by tens of millions.»

paragraphs.text_uk: SEC intake response: «Preliminary investigation opened. MedNext General Counsel notified 2026-07-02.»
paragraphs.text_en: SEC intake response: «Preliminary investigation opened. MedNext General Counsel notified 2026-07-02.»

tools.clue_en: Board rumor says David P. «was always ambitious». Speculation, not evidence.

matches.note_en: «We long suspected David — he was always too focused on money. It was obvious something would come out.»

timeline_phase.instruction_en: Arrange key events from trust creation to board vote. Correct pair +5, wrong pair −3.

events.text_en: Silverwood Family Trust created (Panama), David P. — trustee, Sarah P. — beneficiary

events.text_en: Silverwood Holdings LP created in Cayman → holds 95% of BluePeak Ventures (Delaware)

events.text_en: BluePeak starts accumulating BioLink shares (initial purchase $412K)

events.text_en: David P. + Marcus L. (BioLink CEO) — first private restaurant meeting (SF)

events.text_en: David P. presents $850M acquisition proposal to board

events.text_en: Anonymous whistleblower files SEC filing about hidden COI

events.text_en: BluePeak makes latest purchase of 22,800 shares — 3 weeks before board vote

phase3.instruction_uk: Питання про CFO's COI. Один правильний варіант.
phase3.instruction_en: Questions about CFO's COI. One correct option.

questions.text_uk: David P. може захищатися: «Silverwood trust — це spouse's, не mine. Я тільки trustee.» Це рятує його?
questions.text_en: David P. can defend: «Silverwood trust is spouse's, not mine. I'm only trustee.» Does this save him?

options.text_uk: Так — якщо beneficial owner дружина, це не CFO's interest
options.text_en: Yes — if beneficial owner is wife, that's not CFO's interest
options.feedback_uk: ❌ SEC Rule 16a-1(a)(2) — «beneficial ownership» включає interests spouse's assets. Це не рятує.
options.feedback_en: ❌ SEC Rule 16a-1(a)(2) — «beneficial ownership» includes spouse's assets. Doesn't save him.

options.text_uk: Ні — під SEC Rule 16a-1(a)(2) spouse's assets вважаються beneficial ownership CFO. Плюс він trustee з control.
options.text_en: No — under SEC Rule 16a-1(a)(2) spouse's assets are considered CFO's beneficial ownership. Plus he's trustee with control.
options.feedback_uk: ✓ Правильно. SEC clearly defines beneficial ownership to include spouse + trust interests where insider has control. Sarbanes-Oxley §302 не має цієї exception.
options.feedback_en: ✓ Correct. SEC clearly defines beneficial ownership to include spouse + trust interests where insider has control. Sarbanes-Oxley §302 has no such exception.

options.text_uk: Можливо — залежить від конкретної formulation trust
options.text_en: Maybe — depends on specific trust formulation
options.feedback_en: ❌ No such «flexibility». SEC rules are clear.

options.text_uk: Тільки якщо він може довести отсутність benefit
options.text_en: Only if he can prove absence of benefit
options.feedback_uk: ❌ Burden of proof лежить на insider, і структура вже показує benefit ($35M+).
options.feedback_en: ❌ Burden of proof on insider, and structure already shows benefit ($35M+).

questions.text_uk: BluePeak робила покупки BioLink AFTER David P. знав про acquisition. Це:
questions.text_en: BluePeak made BioLink purchases AFTER David P. knew about acquisition. This is:

options.text_uk: Legit portfolio adjustment — акції можуть купуватися у будь-який час
options.text_en: Legit portfolio adjustment — shares can be bought anytime
options.feedback_uk: ❌ Ні. Section 10b-5 забороняє trading на material non-public information (MNPI). Timing точно з MNPI available = insider trading.
options.feedback_en: ❌ No. Section 10b-5 prohibits trading on material non-public information (MNPI). Timing exactly with MNPI available = insider trading.

options.text_uk: Классическое insider trading за Section 10b-5 + Rule 14e-3
options.text_en: Classic insider trading under Section 10b-5 + Rule 14e-3
options.feedback_uk: ✓ Правильно. Rule 14e-3 — tender-offer-specific. Section 10b-5 covers MNPI. Обидва apply. Це criminal case.
options.feedback_en: ✓ Correct. Rule 14e-3 — tender-offer-specific. Section 10b-5 covers MNPI. Both apply. Criminal case.

options.text_uk: Suspicious але потребує proof of nexus
options.text_en: Suspicious but requires proof of nexus
options.feedback_uk: ⚠️ Технічно так, але nexus вже sufficient — SEC Form 4 filings + M&A proposal timestamp + Panama trust structure = closed loop.
options.feedback_en: ⚠️ Technically yes, but nexus already sufficient — SEC Form 4 + M&A proposal timestamp + Panama trust structure = closed loop.

options.text_uk: Depends on whether Sarah P. (owner) knew about MNPI
options.text_en: Depends on whether Sarah P. (owner) knew about MNPI
options.feedback_uk: ❌ Tipper-tippee liability покриває це. David P. — джерело tips, sufficient.
options.feedback_en: ❌ Tipper-tippee liability covers this. David P. is source of tips, sufficient.

questions.text_uk: У тебе доказ material undisclosed COI + insider trading pattern. Що ти РОБИШ як General Counsel Advisor?
questions.text_en: You have proof of material undisclosed COI + insider trading pattern. What DO you do as General Counsel Advisor?

options.text_uk: Скликати internal board meeting і представити evidence CEO + Chairman
options.text_en: Convene internal board meeting and present evidence to CEO + Chairman
options.feedback_uk: ❌ POLICY BREACH + катастрофа. Board self-investigation of executive-level COI = SEC opens tampering case. External counsel MANDATORY.
options.feedback_en: ❌ POLICY BREACH + catastrophe. Board self-investigation of executive-level COI = SEC opens tampering case. External counsel MANDATORY.

options.text_uk: Terminate David P. immediately і повідомити SEC
options.text_en: Terminate David P. immediately and notify SEC
options.feedback_uk: ❌ POLICY BREACH. Termination без external Legal counsel = wrongful termination lawsuit + ускладнення SEC case.
options.feedback_en: ❌ POLICY BREACH. Termination without external Legal counsel = wrongful termination lawsuit + complications for SEC case.

options.text_uk: Escalate to external Legal Counsel + Special Committee + halt board vote pending investigation
options.text_en: Escalate to external Legal Counsel + Special Committee + halt board vote pending investigation
options.feedback_uk: ✓ Правильно. Політика точно це вимагає: external counsel, ніяких self-investigations. Halt vote зупиняє insider trading exposure.
options.feedback_en: ✓ Correct. Policy requires exactly this: external counsel, no self-investigation. Halt vote stops insider trading exposure.

options.text_uk: Продовжити monitoring без action до board vote
options.text_en: Continue monitoring without action until board vote
options.feedback_uk: ❌ Знання без action = complicity. Board повинен halt vote немедленно.
options.feedback_en: ❌ Knowledge without action = complicity. Board must halt vote immediately.

memo_phase.instruction_uk: Заповни Subject / Evidence / Risk / Recommendation. Політика: тільки external Legal Counsel може діяти. Ніяких self-investigations.
memo_phase.instruction_en: Fill Subject / Evidence / Risk / Recommendation. Policy: only external Legal Counsel can act. No self-investigations.

policy.text_uk: Undisclosed executive COI (особливо у публічній компанії SEC-registered) МУСИТЬ бути ескальовано ЗОВНІШНЬОМУ Legal Counsel ДО будь-яких внутрішніх дій. Ніяких self-investigations правлінням, ніяких direct actions по CFO самою радою. Порушення = SEC tampering + insider trading exposure на MedNext.
policy.text_en: Undisclosed executive COI (especially at public SEC-registered company) MUST be escalated to EXTERNAL Legal Counsel BEFORE any internal action. No self-investigations by board, no direct actions against CFO by board itself. Breach = SEC tampering + insider trading exposure on MedNext.

subjects.text_uk: Undisclosed executive conflict of interest + insider trading pattern
subjects.text_en: Undisclosed executive conflict of interest + insider trading pattern

evidence_pool.text_en: Silverwood Trust (Panama, 2018) → Cayman LP → Delaware BluePeak LLC → 4.2% BioLink ($35.7M) — documented in Panama + Paradise + Pandora Papers + SEC 13F

evidence_pool.text_en: CFO signed 10-K 2025 Item 15: «no material outside interests» — DIRECT contradiction with structure. Sarbanes-Oxley §302 = personal criminal liability

evidence_pool.text_uk: BluePeak purchases BioLink AFTER David P. presented $850M M&A proposal — Section 10b-5 + Rule 14e-3 classic insider trading
evidence_pool.text_en: BluePeak purchases BioLink AFTER David P. presented $850M M&A proposal — Section 10b-5 + Rule 14e-3 classic insider trading

evidence_pool.text_uk: David P. НЕ декларував Silverwood trust у ВСІХ 7 попередніх 10-K (2018-2024) — sistematic non-disclosure
evidence_pool.text_en: David P. did NOT disclose Silverwood trust in ALL 7 prior 10-Ks (2018-2024) — systematic non-disclosure

evidence_pool.text_uk: David P. — lead architect $850M acquisition proposal, він presents і recommends approval на голосуванні через 7 днів
evidence_pool.text_en: David P. — lead architect of $850M acquisition proposal, he presents and recommends approval at vote in 7 days

evidence_pool.text_uk: 5 приватних restaurant meetings CFO ↔ BioLink CEO за 6 місяців, expensed як «business dev» без деталей
evidence_pool.text_en: 5 private restaurant meetings CFO ↔ BioLink CEO over 6 months, expensed as «business dev» without detail

evidence_pool.text_uk: Останні 2 BluePeak purchases — за 3 тижні до board vote, після M&A proposal date
evidence_pool.text_en: Last 2 BluePeak purchases — 3 weeks before board vote, after M&A proposal date

evidence_pool.text_uk: Sarah P. formally beneficial owner, але не має independent business background — straw / nominee
evidence_pool.text_en: Sarah P. formally beneficial owner but has no independent business background — straw / nominee

evidence_pool.text_uk: SEC whistleblower filing (2026-06-29) з accurate description Panama trust — likely insider-source
evidence_pool.text_en: SEC whistleblower filing (2026-06-29) with accurate Panama trust description — likely insider source

evidence_pool.text_uk: LinkedIn: David P. + Marcus L. connected з Jan 2024 (за 2 роки до acquisition)
evidence_pool.text_en: LinkedIn: David P. + Marcus L. connected since Jan 2024 (2 years before acquisition)

evidence_pool.text_uk: Anonymous board rumor: «David завжди був ambitious»
evidence_pool.text_en: Anonymous board rumor: «David was always ambitious»

recommendations.text_uk: Escalate to External Legal Counsel + Independent Special Committee + halt board vote pending investigation + notify SEC Enforcement
recommendations.text_en: Escalate to External Legal Counsel + Independent Special Committee + halt board vote pending investigation + notify SEC Enforcement
recommendations.feedback_uk: ✓ Правильно. Політика ЯКРАЗ це вимагає. External counsel = no self-tampering. Halt vote = зупиняє insider trading exposure. SEC notification = protects компанію.
recommendations.feedback_en: ✓ Correct. Policy REQUIRES exactly this. External counsel = no self-tampering. Halt vote = stops insider trading exposure. SEC notification = protects the company.

recommendations.text_uk: Terminate David P. immediately + Public Announcement
recommendations.text_en: Terminate David P. immediately + Public Announcement
recommendations.feedback_uk: ❌ POLICY BREACH + катастрофа. Wrongful termination lawsuit + destroys SEC case + market panic + stock crash.
recommendations.feedback_en: ❌ POLICY BREACH + catastrophe. Wrongful termination lawsuit + destroys SEC case + market panic + stock crash.

recommendations.text_uk: Internal Board review + Confront David P. privately
recommendations.text_en: Internal Board review + Confront David P. privately
recommendations.feedback_uk: ❌ POLICY BREACH. Self-investigation = SEC tampering charges на весь board. Тіло = evidence destruction opportunity for David P.
recommendations.feedback_en: ❌ POLICY BREACH. Self-investigation = SEC tampering charges on the whole board. Also = evidence destruction opportunity for David P.

recommendations.text_uk: Order forensic audit FIRST, then decide
recommendations.text_en: Order forensic audit FIRST, then decide
recommendations.feedback_uk: ❌ Час критичний — board vote через 7 днів. Audit займе тижні. Ти пропустиш window.
recommendations.feedback_en: ❌ Time critical — board vote in 7 days. Audit takes weeks. You miss the window.

recommendations.text_uk: Monitor and let board vote proceed
recommendations.text_en: Monitor and let board vote proceed
recommendations.feedback_uk: ❌ Complicity. Ти маєш actionable knowledge — inaction = criminal exposure.
recommendations.feedback_en: ❌ Complicity. You have actionable knowledge — inaction = criminal exposure.

recommendations.feedback_uk: ❌ Overwhelming evidence з 4 незалежних sources (Panama Papers + SEC filings + expense reports + LinkedIn timing).
recommendations.feedback_en: ❌ Overwhelming evidence from 4 independent sources (Panama Papers + SEC filings + expense reports + LinkedIn timing).

master.msg_uk: Ти захистив публічну компанію від SEC-level катастрофи.
master.msg_en: You protected a public company from SEC-level catastrophe.
